ModMetaData.name: Standalone Unified Panaquatic Growing Zone
ModMetaData.author: royallyTipsy
ModMetaData.description: This mod adds a standalone aquatic growing zone. It takes plants from mods like Vanilla Plants Expanded - More Plants, [LTS]Biosphere, and Goji's Fantasy Race: Merren, and puts them into a unified gizmo. It also allows growing in ocean tiles and define salinity preference for plants.
